PROP-01b-partial-pre-004.text: bid() with empty solution must pre-approve exact getAssetOutAmount; non-empty solution skips pre-approval.
PROP-01b-partial-pre-004.assertion: bid(assetIn, amount, solution): solution.length == 0 => forceApprove(auction, getAssetOutAmount(...))

locations.note: Branch at lines 75-79: if solution.length == 0 (else branch), calls forceApprove(auction, getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp)) at line 78. If solution.length > 0 (if branch), encodes solution for callback and skips pre-approval.
When solution is non-empty, approval is deferred to post-callback forceApprove at line 111
